svg.title: Observability architecture — order-triage AgentCore (control plane)
svg.desc: Grey control plane of the order-triage AgentCore system. Two independent emission mechanisms — ADOT gen_ai.* spans to X-Ray Transaction Search (aws/spans), and a hand-rolled per-turn EMF token metric printed to the UNMASKED runtime -DEFAULT log group and auto-extracted into the OrderTriage/Agent namespace — feed per-resource APPLICATION_LOGS / USAGE_LOGS / TRACES delivery trios plus the MASKED Bedrock model-invocation log. Downstream: 4 audience dashboards, the static+anomaly alarms rolling into a composite to SNS and email, Contributor Insights, App-Signals SLOs, and opt-in online Evaluations.
svg.text: Source (telemetry emitters) → Routing + Enrichment (log groups · X-Ray · evaluations) → Destination (governance / operations dashboards · anomaly alarms → SNS → email). Off the InvokeAgentRuntime request path.
Routing + Enrichment — log groups · X-Ray · evaluations
